title: SyntheticCsvQualityReportInput
description: Input parameters for a synthetic employee and region CSV data-quality and grouping report.

employees.description: Employee names supplied by the user.

regions.description: Region names supplied by the user.

time_range.description: Optional inclusive range; defaults to the most recent 30 days through today.

record_count.description: Number of synthetic historical records to generate.

seed.description: Random seed used to reproduce synthetic data.

report_title.default: Employee and Region Data Quality Report
report_title.description: Title of the final English report.
